query:
SELECT n.id, n.organizationId, o.name, o.slug, n.fileName, n.fileUrl, n.createdAt 
FROM orgNotes n 
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = n.organizationId
WHERE n.uploadedBy = 'rbennett@tuscrad.com' AND n.createdAt >= '2026-05-19'
ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC;
command:
